c.f: IF(NOT(helper_geographicalScope_detailedView), "Unknown - Unknown", _xlfn.LET( _xlpm.values, IFERROR( VLOOKUP( OFFSET(Geoscope_int, 0, 1, ROWS(Geoscope_int), 1), \parameter_geoscope_int_names, 2, FALSE ) & " - " & VLOOKUP( OFFSET(Geoscope_int, 0, 2, ROWS(Geoscope_int), 1), \parameter_geoscope_int_names, 2, FALSE ), ""), _xlfn._xlws.FILTER(_xlpm.values, helper_geographicalScope_filledCorrectly)))

IF(calc_midmarket, _xlfn.SEQUENCE( COUNTA(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(B130)), 1, calc_limit_general, 0), _xlfn.BYROW(\selected_limit_transportationtype, _xlfn.LAMBDA(_xlpm.data, IF( _xlpm.data = "", calc_limit_general, MIN(calc_limit_general, _xlpm.data )))))

IF(calc_midmarket, _xlfn.SEQUENCE( COUNTA(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(B130)), 1, calc_deductiblemax_general, 0), IF( calc_deductible_notspecified_transportationtype = 0, IF(\selected_deductibleprop_transportationtype = 0, \selected_deductible_transportationtype, IF(\selected_deductiblemax_transportationtype = "", calc_llthreshold1_transport*calc_fxrate, \selected_deductiblemax_transportationtype)), calc_deductiblemax_general))

IF(calc_midmarket, _xlfn.SEQUENCE( COUNTA(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(B130)), 1, calc_deductibleagg_general, 0), _xlfn.LET(_xlpm.data, OFFSET(\selected_conditions_deductibleAggregat_Land, 0, 0, COUNTA(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(F130))), IF(_xlpm.data = "", calc_deductibleagg_general, _xlpm.data)))
IF( Parameter!B58, IF(G28, EXP(R143 + R146), EXP(Parameter!B22 + 1/2 * Parameter!B24)), \parameter_constant_severitymodel)

IF(FALSE, (calc_exposure_transport_total_EUR/\parameter_baseexposure_transport)^\parameter_zerohurdle_turnover & " Wird nicht benutzt solange Zero Hurdle gewählt ist und der Zero hurdle teil vom Umsatz abhängt.", 1)

INDEX( \parameter_geoscope_int_int, MATCH(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY( calc_geoscope_int_int_hashtag), INDEX( \parameter_geoscope_int_int, , 1), 0), MATCH("Adjustment Loss Count", \parameter_geoscope_int_int_header, 0))

INDEX( \parameter_geoscope_int_int, MATCH(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY( calc_geoscope_int_int_hashtag), INDEX( \parameter_geoscope_int_int, , 1), 0), MATCH("Adjustment Severity", \parameter_geoscope_int_int_header, 0))

calc_retention_minvalue1_transportationtype * ( IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue1_transportationtype) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue2_transportationtype) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) )

calc_deductibleprop_transportationtype * ( IFERROR(_xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue2_transportationtype) - calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_mvalue_transportationtype) - calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) + calc_retention_mvalue_transportationtype * ( IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_mvalue_transportationtype) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - 1 ) )

calc_retention_minvalue1_temperaturecontrolled * ( IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue1_temperaturecontrolled) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue2_temperaturecontrolled) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) )

calc_deductibleprop_temperaturecontrolled * ( IFERROR(_xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_minvalue2_temperaturecontrolled) - calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_mvalue_temperaturecontrolled) - calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) + calc_retention_mvalue_temperaturecontrolled * ( IFERROR( _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( (LN(calc_retention_mvalue_temperaturecontrolled) + calc_sigma2) / calc_sigma, TRUE), 0) - 1 ) )

PRODUCT(calc_losscount_adjretention, calc_losscount_adjlimit, calc_losscount_adjbasisvaluation, calc_losscount_adjgeoscope, calc_losscount_adjpackagingtype, calc_losscount_adjtransportationtype, calc_losscount_adjgoods, calc_losscount_modelled)
PRODUCT(calc_severity_adjlimit, calc_severity_adjbasisvaluation, calc_severity_adjgeoscope, calc_severity_adjpackagingtype, calc_severity_adjtransportationtype, calc_severity_adjgoods)

calc_severity_ELP_AAD * (1 - _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( ( LN(calc_severity_ded_AAD) - calc_severity_mu_AAD - \parameter_constant2_severitymodel ) / calc_sigma, TRUE ) ) - calc_severity_ded_AAD * (1 - _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( ( LN(calc_severity_ded_AAD) - calc_severity_mu_AAD ) / calc_sigma, TRUE ) )
1 - SUM( calc_losscount_AAD^(ROW( OFFSET($A$1, , , C288 + 1 )) - 1) / FACT(ROW( OFFSET($A$1, , , C288 + 1 )) - 1) * EXP(-calc_losscount_AAD) )
(1 - _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( ( LN((B288 + 1 - C288) * D288) - calc_severity_mu_AAD ) / calc_sigma, TRUE ) )

( calc_losscount_AAD - SUM( (ROW( OFFSET($A$1, , , C288 + 1 )) - 1) * calc_losscount_AAD^(ROW( OFFSET($A$1, , , C288 + 1 )) - 1) / FACT(ROW( OFFSET($A$1, , , C288 + 1 )) - 1) * EXP(-calc_losscount_AAD) ) ) / F288

IFERROR(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY( D487) - ( (_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(D487) - \parameter_llthreshold1_transport) * (1 - _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( ( LN(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(G487) - \parameter_llthreshold1_transport) -_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY( E499) - \parameter_ll_LN_Dispersion ) / SQRT(\parameter_ll_LN_Dispersion), TRUE)) - (_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(G487) - \parameter_llthreshold1_transport) * (1 - _xlfn.NORM.S.DIST( ( LN(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(G487) - \parameter_llthreshold1_transport) -_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY( E499) ) / SQRT(\parameter_ll_LN_Dispersion),TRUE) )), G487:G490 )

_xlfn._xlws.FILTER( OFFSET(\selected_country1_Krieg, 0, 0, ROW(\selected_additional_limit_IP) - ROW(\selected_country1_Krieg) ), OFFSET(\selected_country1_Krieg, 0, 0, ROW(\selected_additional_limit_IP) - ROW(\selected_country1_Krieg) ) <> 0, "")

_xlfn._xlws.FILTER( OFFSET(\selected_country1_Krieg, 0, 0, ROW(\selected_additional_limit_IP) - ROW(\selected_country1_Krieg) ), OFFSET(\selected_country1_Krieg, 0, 0, ROW(\selected_additional_limit_IP) - ROW(\selected_country1_Krieg) ) <> 0, "")
IF( G23 > 0, "The Total expected loss corresponds to " & FIXED(result_expectedloss_total / G23 * 1000, 2) & "‰ of the turnover.", "")
c.v: The Total expected loss corresponds to 0,12‰ of the turnover.

c.f: _xlfn.LET(_xlpm.value, IF(C800 = "percentage", F812 / (1 - C801 / 100), IF(C800 = "fixed value", F812 + C801, F812)), _xlpm.value + IF( AND(calc_midmarket, _xlpm.value < \parameter_premiumPerLocalPolicy_EUR), \parameter_premiumPerLocalPolicy_EUR - _xlpm.value, 0)) + \parameter_premiumPerLocalPolicy_EUR * IF( AND(calc_midmarket, \selected_ipflag = "Yes" ), \selected_ip_numberLocalPolicies, 0 )
IF(C800 = "percentage", F827 / (1 - C801 / 100), IF(C800 = "fixed value", F827 + C801, F827))
